feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to Add attachments from GOS to class based workflow decision ?
entry.content:
Greetings.

I have created a workflow using class(SE24).  I have GOS function from which user can add attachments. Now i want to show these attachments under "Objects & Attachments" in decision workitem of the workflow. How to link the business object used for GOS with class based workflow and show attachments from it ?

entry.title: graduation project : SAP Based Smart Job Tracking System Hello,
entry.content:
Hello,

The topic of my graduation project is to develop an SAP Based Smart Job Tracking System. In this project, I aim to optimise job tracking and management processes using the SAP ERP system. My goal is to create a system that allows users to plan and track their daily tasks and perform performance analysis via SAP GUI or a web/mobile interface.

Within the scope of the project, I plan to develop a solution that includes the following main functions:

SAP ABAP Based Job Tracking System: I plan to provide business logic and data management with SAP ABAP.
User Based Task Assignment and Tracking Module: It will be a module where tasks are assigned and tracked for users.
AI Supported Performance Analysis and Reporting: Performance predictions and analyses will be made using machine learning and data mining.
Web Interface: I will develop a user-friendly interface using SAP Fiori or an independent platform.
Database Integration (SAP HANA): I plan to use SAP's HANA system as a database.
Integration with Non-SAP Data with Web Services: Integration with non-SAP data sources using REST API.


I am currently in the idea phase of this project and I am not quite sure what steps I should take to get started. I have a lot of ideas for the project, but I honestly don't know how to realise them yet. I would like to find out what kind of resources I should turn to in order to gain in-depth knowledge about SAP, ABAP, SAP HANA, Web services and AI. I am especially looking for basic guides or step-by-step guides on these technologies. I would also like to learn about the possible challenges I might face in this project and get more suggestions.

I plan to use web services for external data integration in the project.

I would like to get your suggestions and feedback on the development of the project and its integration with SAP. I would be very grateful if you can provide guidance on which resources I should take a look at. Thank you very much in advance if you take your valuable time and reply.

Yours sincerely,
Zeynep

Translated with DeepL.com (free version)

entry.title: Release after output
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

What does "Release after output" check box mean in NACE t-code?

I tested and found that whether it is checked or not, it will still print the output. I don't understand much about this function.

Thanks and Regards

entry.title: Unable to edit ABAP Language version of a database table in eclipse ADT.
entry.content:
Hello All,

we have created a new database table and saved in a package for which the "The Default ABAP Language Version" is set to ABAP for Cloud Development, but the software component is updated to HOME (Standard ABAP). Later we have updated the software component the package to "ABAP for Cloud". Now we wanted to change the ABAP language version of the table that was already created to ABAP for Cloud development from Standard ABAP. But the field is not input enabled in eclipse ADT.

How can we update this? If this is not possible to update, do we get any issues if we keep this ABAP Language Version to Standard ABAP in TIER1 Package.

 

Regards,

Ram Peddireddi

entry.title: "This message is from an external sender" creates folder in clients mail box
entry.content:
Hello All, we are triggering mails to user which mail domain is out side of organization.

Smart form is generating this PDF and using CL_BCS we are triggering mail to user.

 

 

The issue is whenever we trigger PDF from invoice VF02, user is getting PDF attachment inside the folder, which is not happening in our mail ids.

It is something like Outlook is creating secure folder for user since mail is coming from outside of his organization, but user doesn’t need this folder.

If anyone faced this issue please let me know the solution, it could be from SAP or Outlook mail box setting.

entry.title: Can Variant Management be used to switch between List View and Reporting View with the same data?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently working on a Fiori application where I need to present the same underlying data in two different views: a classic List View and a Reporting View (for example, an OverviewPage). My question is:

Is it possible to use Variant Management to switch between these two distinct app views?

So far, I've used Variant Management primarily for storing and restoring filters, columns, or layout settings within a single template. However, my idea is to see if I can leverage it to swap out entire templates (i.e., switching from a List View to a Reporting View) while using the same data source.

If anyone has experience with this scenario or can share insights on whether this is feasible—or if not, what alternative approaches (such as routing or cross-application navigation) might be recommended—I would greatly appreciate your input.

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Purchase Requisition ME52N: clear the item deletion status
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm a beginner in PR's management, and I would need help to update (through ABAP code) a PR item that has been set as deleted (Status = Deleted).

What I exactly need is to programmatically remove the item deletion status, that is to say, set the item back to life.

 

Thank you so much for any help in this regard.

JF

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02 - Weiterführung nach Testphase & ABAP-Entwicklung
entry.content:
Hallo zusammen,

wir haben die 30-Tage-Testversion "SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02, Fully-Activated Appliance" genutzt und diese hat für unser Startup Unternehmen erfolgreich funktioniert. Nun möchten wir die Umgebung kostenpflichtig weiterführen.

Soweit ich verstanden habe, ist hierfür eine gültige S/4HANA-Lizenz erforderlich.
Ich gehe davon aus, dass folgende Lizenz für uns passend wäre:
Cloud Test, Demo, and Development for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, one-system landscape (8012331) – 450,00 EUR

Meine Fragen dazu:

  1. Sobald wir diese Lizenz erworben haben, können wir dann unsere bestehende SAP Cloud Appliance Library (CAL)-Instanz weiterführen oder muss eine neue Instanz aufgesetzt werden?
  2. Aktuell erhalten wir erwerben einer SAP CAL Abonnent folgende Fehlermeldung – ist das normal, solange keine gültige Lizenz hinterlegt ist?
  3. Können wir auf der "SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02, Fully-Activated Appliance"-Instanz eigene ABAP-Programme entwickeln und einen Namensraum reservieren?

Vielen Dank im Voraus für eure Unterstützung!

Beste Grüße
zero4788

--

Hello everyone,

We have been using the "SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02, Fully-Activated Appliance" 30-day trial, and it has worked successfully for our startup. Now, we would like to continue using it on a paid basis.

As I understand, a valid S/4HANA license is required for this. I assume the following license would be the right choice for us:
Cloud Test, Demo, and Development for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, one-system landscape (8012331) – 450.00 EUR

My questions regarding this:

  1. Once we purchase this license, can we continue using our existing SAP Cloud Appliance Library (CAL) instance, or do we need to set up a new one?
  2. We are currently receiving an error message when to buy CAL abbonenent– is this normal as long as there is no valid license assigned?


  3. Can we develop our own ABAP programs and reserve a namespace on the "SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02, Fully-Activated Appliance" instance?

Thanks in advance for your support!

Best regards,
zero4788

entry.title: Fiori : add new field on screen
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

Is it possible to add new field on this screen?

any instructions will be helpful.

Regards,

Manthana

entry.title: How to handle errors for semantic key with number range in RAP?
entry.content:
Following scenario:

Managed RAP BO wit draft with managed numbering and UUID as key. In addition a semantic key should be generated by the system as a non-key field using a number range object. How do you do this correctly?

I tried using a determination on save and using number_get_next there. That works usually, but:

  • In case of errors you can only report a warning in a determination using reported as there is no failed which the user can chose to ignore. According to the documentation (https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/determination-and-validation-modelling#failed-entries-from-determinations) you should store the error somewhere in a buffer and check for it in a validation.
  • While that does work, in case of an error the save is blocked but also the number from the number range has still been picked since the LUW used in the determination is not rolled back? This results in a number gap.

I had a look at late unmanaged numbering but that only seems to be usable for the key field which in my case should still be managed numbering with UUID.

Is this scenario not covered or am I missing something?

entry.title: Dynamic assignment variant for Field-symbols not allowed
entry.content:
I have a class in which I have defined various Text elements.
For eg.
H01=Title1
H02=Title2
H03=Title3
H04=Title4
etc.
I am trying to print all the titles in my class. I have a loop in my class and I am building the text element name dynamically.

lv_title = `TEXT-H` && conv ty_n2( sy-tabix ).

Now, I use this variable to dynamically access the text element in the program

assign (lv_title) to <title>.

Class is syntactically correct and executes fine with expected results.

But, I get a warning saying: "The old variant of "<dynamic-object>" should not be used in the current ABAP language version."

If this is considered the "old" variant, what is the equivalent "new" variant to access variables by name?

I am on ABAP Cloud version, so that limits the commands available to me (for eg. READ TEXTPOOL isn't available to me)

entry.title: SAP ABAP JSON to ABAP Structure
entry.content:
Everyone, Currently I am trying to deserialize a Json response into the sap deep structure but facing an issue that it is deserializing only have some part of the response, it is not able to deserialize complex deep structure. This is the response that I am trying to deserialize.

{"detail":[{"type":"success","data":[{"id":"bb3dbe1c-def5-45ff-beec-bcfbc6bce751","job_id":"45c42a0c-3d47-44fd-912d-02008a7a4e4a","status":"Completed","name":"MY_Use Case 1_Insurance_Motor Quotation.pdf","type":"application/pdf","result":{"line":"Allianz General Insurance Company (Malaysia) Berhad (200601015674) Quotation No : QKL24100001965 Authorised Agent TBB ENTERPRISE SDN. BHD. Issued Date : 02-10-2024 NO. 329, 1ST FLOOR, JALAN PUDU 55100 KUALA LUMPUR Contact: 92228855 Fax No: 92225491 E-Mail: general@tbb.com.my Motor Quotation Quotation To LIAU CHIEW HAR Client Gender FEMALE Client NRIC / Busn. Reg 76102512xxxx Client Marital Status MARRIED Client Postcode 47100 Client City PUCHONG Client State SELANGOR Client HP / Phone No 60123495159 Client Email ALICE_LIAU@YAHOO.CO.UK Vehicle No. VDU1215 Agent Code KL32922 Cover Note Type NEW BUSINESS - OLD VEHICLE, OLD REGISTRATION Vehicle Class PRIVATE CARS EXCLUDING GOODS Vehicle Use PRIVATE CAR -PRIVATE USE (DRIVE TO WORK/DAILY USE) Type of Cover COMPREHENSIVE Inception Date 05-10-2024 Expiry Date 04-10-2025 Make & Model HONDA CR-V 1.5L TC-P 2WD Capacity 1498.00 CC No. of Seats 5 Year of Manufacturing 2019 Sum Insured RM 117,000.00 Agreed Value) (HONDA CR-V RW WAGON TC-P 2WD (A) 1.5 [4DOOR 1 SPEED CONSTANTLY VARIABLE] CKD-HIGH) NCD 55.00 % Basic Premium (Vehicle) 3,143.24 Basic Premium (Trailer) + 0.00 3,143.24 NCD 55.00 - 1,728.78 ADD BENEFIT SUM INSURED UNNAMED DRIVER RM 0.00 20.00 LEGAL LIABILITY OF PASSENGERS FOR NEGLIGENT ACTS RM 0.00 7.50 COVER FOR WINDSCREENS, WINDOWS AND SUNROOF RM 2,000.00 300.00 INCLUSION OF SPECIAL PERILS RM 117,000.00 234.00 KEY CARE RM 1,000.00 7.00 CAR BREAK-IN/ROBBERY RM 500.00 3.00 MOTOR ENHANCED ROAD WARRIOR (PLAN A) RM 10,000.00 99.00 LEGAL LIABILITY TO PASSENGERS RM 0.00 33.75 Gross Premium 2,118.71 + Stamp Duty + 10.00 Total Insurance Premium 2,128.71 0.00 Road Tax 0.00 Other Amount 0.00 Service Tax + 169.50 Total Payable 2298.21 Amount Payable (Rounded) 2298.20 Risk Excess 0.00 Page 1 02-10-2024 11:56:27 ","form":{"NCD":"55.00 %","Cover Note Type":"NEW BUSINESS - OLD VEHICLE, OLD REGISTRATION","Client HP / Phone No":"60123495159","Type of Cover":"COMPREHENSIVE","Agent Code":"KL32922","Fax No:":"92225491","Vehicle Use":"PRIVATE CAR -PRIVATE USE (DRIVE TO WORK/DAILY USE)","Vehicle No.":"VDU1215","Issued Date :":"02-10-2024","Contact:":"92228855","E-Mail:":"general@tbb.com.my","Year of Manufacturing":"2019","Client Gender":"FEMALE","Vehicle Class":"PRIVATE CARS EXCLUDING GOODS","Client Postcode":"47100","Client City":"PUCHONG","Client NRIC / Busn. Reg":"76102512xxxx","Client Marital Status":"MARRIED","Client Email":"ALICE_LIAU@YAHOO.CO.UK","Make & Model":"HONDA CR-V 1.5L TC-P 2WD","Capacity":"1498.00 CC","Quotation No :":"QKL24100001965","Amount Payable (Rounded)":"2298.20","Page":"1","Quotation To":"LIAU CHIEW HAR","Client State":"SELANGOR","Expiry Date":"04-10-2025","Sum Insured":"RM 117,000.00 Agreed Value) (HONDA CR-V RW WAGON TC-P 2WD (A) 1.5 [4DOOR 1 SPEED CONSTANTLY VARIABLE] CKD-HIGH)","No. of Seats":"5","Basic Premium (Trailer) +":"0.00 3,143.24","Inception Date":"05-10-2024","Road Tax":"0.00","Risk Excess":"0.00","+ Stamp Duty":"10.00","55.00 -":"1,728.78","Basic Premium (Vehicle)":"3,143.24","Other Amount":"0.00","Gross Premium":"2,118.71","Total Insurance Premium":"2,128.71","Service Tax":"169.50","Total Payable":"2298.21","LEGAL LIABILITY TO PASSENGERS":"33.75","Berhad":"(200601015674)","COVER FOR WINDSCREENS, WINDOWS AND SUNROOF RM 2,000.00":"300.00","LEGAL LIABILITY OF PASSENGERS FOR NEGLIGENT ACTS RM 0.00":"7.50","UNNAMED DRIVER RM 0.00":"20.00","MOTOR ENHANCED ROAD WARRIOR (PLAN A) RM 10,000.00":"99.00"},"table":[{"heading":[""],"rows":[""]}],"signature":[],"barcode":[]},"document_id":"ccb4835aee3ebc0a21e1055eb341a9f6","page_number":1,"document_url":"https://bsl-idp.s3.amazonaws.com/45c42a0c-3d47-44fd-912d-02008a7a4e4a/extract/tmp/0_45c42a0c-3d47-44fd-912d-02008a7a4e4a_convert_page_to_image_7210ef34-edec-4db3-8f5d-d70431a01cef.png?X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Credential=AKIA5MOD6YSH6SB7LSYY%2F20250227%2Fap-south-1%2Fs3%2Faws4_request&X-Amz-Date=20250227T061203Z&X-Amz-Expires=604800&X-Amz-SignedHeaders=host&X-Amz-Signature=175525131e052ba6bcac9af50487729f83710edadb3a17cfad8d5933c8bfa035","updated_at":"2025-02-12T10:53:49.667447+05:30","file_size":94096,"pages":2,"created_at":"2025-02-12T10:53:37.820070+05:30","page_processing_time":"0:00:11.847377"},{"id":"509e28db-6794-4e02-91d3-e35f4c7310e9","job_id":"45c42a0c-3d47-44fd-912d-02008a7a4e4a","status":"Completed","name":"MY_Use Case 1_Insurance_Motor Quotation.pdf","type":"application/pdf","result":{"line":"Allianz General Insurance Company (Malaysia) Berhad (200601015674) Quotation No : QKL24100001965 Authorised Agent TBB ENTERPRISE SDN. BHD. Issued Date : 02-10-2024 NO. 329, 1ST FLOOR, JALAN PUDU 55100 KUALA LUMPUR Contact: 92228855 Fax No: 92225491 E-Mail: general@tbb.com.my Voluntary Excess 0.00 Excess is the first amount that you are required to pay towards a claim you make on your car. Voluntary excess is the amount of excess you may opt in return of lower basic premium. Risk excess is the amount of excess determined by the company based on your risk criteria. Disclaimer: This quotation is valid until 01/12/2024 subject to the details provided to generate this quotation are accurate. Our Company's acceptance of your offer based on a valid quotation is subject to our Company's Underwriting Guidelines Kindly notify us immediately if any of the details given in this quotation is inaccurate. Please note that any misrepresentation may result in avoidance of your contract of insurance, refusal or reduction of your claim, change of terms or termination of your contract of insurance in accordance with Schedule 9 of the Financial Services Act 2013. Any policy issuance, entitlement or claims submitted arising from the insurance contract issued shall be subjected to the requirements of Economic Sanctions, Terrorism Financing, Proliferation Financing and other UN-sanction Regimes. The sum insured of your vehicle at the time you purchased / renewed this policy as well as the market value at the time of the loss is determined by the motor vehicle market valuation system (SNK Market Data Research Sdn Bhd) approved by Persatuan Insurans Am Malaysia (PIAM). You should insure your vehicle at our agreed value or its current market value to avoid under-insurance or over- insurance. For more information on the effect of under-insurance and over-insurance, please refer to our policy wording or Allianz authorised agent. Page 2 02-10-2024 11:56:27 ","form":{"Disclaimer:":"This quotation is valid until 01/12/2024 subject to the details provided to generate this quotation are accurate. Our Company's acceptance of your offer based on a valid quotation is subject to our Company's Underwriting Guidelines","Authorised":"TBB ENTERPRISE SDN. BHD.","Fax No:":"92225491","Issued Date :":"02-10-2024","Contact:":null,"E-Mail:":"general@tbb.com.my","Quotation No :":"QKL24100001965","Voluntary Excess":"0.00","Page":"2","Allianz General Insurance Company (Malaysia) Berhad":"(200601015674)","Agent":"NO. 329, 1ST FLOOR, JALAN PUDU 55100 KUALA LUMPUR 92228855"},"table":[{"heading":[""],"rows":[[""]]}],"signature":[],"barcode":[]},"document_id":"ccb4835aee3ebc0a21e1055eb341a9f6","page_number":2,"document_url":"https://bsl-idp.s3.amazonaws.com/45c42a0c-3d47-44fd-912d-02008a7a4e4a/extract/tmp/1_45c42a0c-3d47-44fd-912d-02008a7a4e4a_convert_page_to_image_77bba64a-999e-4cee-825e-a3c6e33fd486.png?X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Credential=AKIA5MOD6YSH6SB7LSYY%2F20250227%2Fap-south-1%2Fs3%2Faws4_request&X-Amz-Date=20250227T061203Z&X-Amz-Expires=604800&X-Amz-SignedHeaders=host&X-Amz-Signature=b7aecb9551d414d46e2f5c44523e567abd7c29fa5b23f304a791814c583720d1","updated_at":"2025-02-12T10:54:00.487873+05:30","file_size":94096,"pages":2,"created_at":"2025-02-12T10:53:49.671843+05:30","page_processing_time":"0:00:10.816030"}],"msg":"Record fetch successfully","traceback_id":"72a57f9a-6d87-4953-bfa8-fd4e3f28d4b2"}]}

In this response I am able to get the data till 'data' structure, but I am not able to get any in 'Result' or any structure of 'result'. Can anyone tell what the issue is because I have created structure exactly as in the response. This is the class I am currently using but I have already tried multiple methods but to no avail.
TRY.
    /ui2/cl_json=>deserialize(
      EXPORTING
        json = lv_nextresp1
      CHANGING
        data = lr_data ).
  CATCH cx_root INTO lx_exception1.
    WRITE: / 'Error during deserialization: ', lx_exception->get_text( ).
    RETURN.
ENDTRY.

Thanks

entry.title: CDS View to get Purchase Requisition Approval Detail in SAP Public Cloud System
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Please recommend us CDS view to be use in Eclipse ADT for purchase requisition workflow approval details in SAP public cloud system which include Status, notes during approval, processor, approval date etc.

We found below service which is returning the results as we need however we could not use in ADT or when used in Business Application Studio we could not deploy the application.

  • "/sap/opu/odata/sap/SWF_FLEX_DEF_SRV/GetApplicationWorkflowInstances"

Regards,

Iftikhar Ali

entry.title: GTS Commercial invoice weird form layout for different document number
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are facing issue with GTS commercial invoice output for 2 different documents its giving weird output.

layout headers are static texts and printing different than layout created.

i have attached both the forms layout, please check and suggest.

thanks

Surya

entry.title: CP_CC_S_COPY_BY_TSK - Task List Text
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a report where we are able to duplicate routings and modify the last operation.
This works fine, but the problem is that in the duplicated routing the text in task list remains the same as the copied routing.



How can I modify this text through that function?
Maybe we need to change to another function module?

Thank you very much!

entry.title: PU19 Error in Generating PDF
entry.content:
Hello, 

what could be the possible cause of these errors? I already checked the ADS and it its working fine, the forms are also maintained in V_T5UX7

Note: It is working in Prod system but not working in Lower Environments

entry.title: Custom routine for pricing procedure not performing calculation
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I am doing some experimentation and trying to create a custom routine. I am not familiar with the process and running into some problems at the moment. In my code below, I am trying to give a user a discount if in the current month they have more than 3 orders over the value of 3000. I see some people use "komp" in their code, but what is this and how can it be implemented in my scenario? Can someone please shed some light as to where I am going wrong?

DATA: lv_order_count        TYPE i,
      lv_total_value        TYPE decimal10_2,
      lv_discount           TYPE decimal10_2,
      lv_discounted_value   TYPE decimal10_2,
      lt_vbak               TYPE TABLE OF vbak,
      ls_vbak               TYPE vbak,
      lv_first_day_of_month TYPE sy-datum.

lv_first_day_of_month = sy-datum(6) && '01'.

SELECT * FROM vbak INTO TABLE lt_vbak
   WHERE erdat BETWEEN lv_first_day_of_month AND sy-datum and netwr > 3000 AND kunnr = '1987653'.

lv_order_count = LINES( lt_vbak ).

 LOOP AT lt_vbak INTO ls_vbak.
    IF lv_order_count > 3.
      lv_discount = ls_vbak-netwr * '0.03'.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.

entry.title: SAP Workflow, Multi-level Approval and Parallel Approvers
entry.content:
Hi Workflows Experts,

I just started my workflow learning few days ago and have questions about this workflow scenario.

Basically i'm supposed to create multi-level approval with some approvers each levels like this: 

Explanation : Workflow has several level approvers. Each of the level have several approvers that will receive User Decision task to approve/reject. All approvers at same level must approve all to continue to next level.

at begining, I thought it can be achieved it using Loop and Block with ParForeach. 

But I realized when define Parallel Processing on Block, Multiline Element can only contain like one internal table.

 

 

 

And we cannot fill Multiline Element with expressions within Looping using looping counter like this :

APPROVERS[&LOOPING_COUNTER&] 

*&LOOPING_COUNTER& will increased within the loop which i want to use as level approval,*

 

Please kindly suggest how to achieve this. Maybe my WF has wrong design.

Thanks for your help and suggestions.

entry.title: How to assign dynamic navigation parameters in SAP Fiori Notification?
entry.content:
I want to display a user's SuccessFactors to-do list as notifications in a Fiori application.

I am fetching data via the SuccessFactors API, and the response contains dynamic navigation links for each to-do task. In my requirement for a notification app, when a user clicks on a notification, it should navigate to the corresponding SuccessFactors task link.

My question is: How do I assign these dynamic links, fetched from the SuccessFactors API, to each notification?

While creating notifications, we define navigation properties, but I suppose that only works for static links.

To create notifications, I am using the CREATE_NOTIFICATIONS method of the class /IWNGW/CL_NOTIFICATION_API. I have also created a notification provider class that inherits from the /IWNGW/IF_NOTIF_PROVIDER interface.

Any guidance on how to achieve this would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: BP Relationship enhance - Not saving data BUT050
entry.content:
Hello,
I have a requirement to create a new field on BP relationship for BP. Field was created as append for BUT050, BUPT configuration done. Field is displayed on ALV, but when we input values on newly created screen ( "Z" screen containing custom field ), data is not updated. When returning to ALV screen, updates are not there . It seems like cvi_bdt_adapter=>data_pai used in my ZBUB_BUPR_PAI_RELAT function module is not working. 

I followed below link as base:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GE0A2Ae1Z4Q 

Any hint or suggestion ?  Has someone done this kind of enhancement ? 
Thanks in advance.
